{{Quote|I'm a Rebel. Judging by the look in your eye, I'd say you are too, eh? Yeah, I'm a good judge of character. Anyway, as you were asking - I'm looking for a new place to hide out in case the long arm of the Empire comes down on us.|Daiv Dekven, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:DD" />}}
'''Daiv Dekven''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:DD" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Dekven was wounded on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] while searching for a new place to hide in case of discovery by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. He had to recover in a hospital at a [[Agro Outpost|pirate outpost]]. At the outpost, he met a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] who was willing to check out the [[Mokk Stronghold]] for him, to see if it was still occupied by [[Dantari]] or could be used by the Rebellion.<ref name="SWG:DD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Daiv Dekven was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:DD" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Daiv Dekven was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref> He was one of many "[[W:c:swg:Herald NPC|herald NPCs]]" that were used to guide players to static points of interest and dungeons.
